de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.rule.tacletbuilder

Class AbstractInfFlowContractAppTacletBuilder.InfFlowContractAppRewriteTacletBuilder

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder.TacletBuilder<T>
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder.FindTacletBuilder<T>
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.tacletbuilder.RewriteTacletBuilder<InfFlowContractAppTaclet>
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.informationflow.rule.tacletbuilder.AbstractInfFlowContractAppTacletBuilder.InfFlowContractAppRewriteTacletBuilder
  • Enclosing class:
    AbstractInfFlowContractAppTacletBuilder

    private class AbstractInfFlowContractAppTacletBuilder.InfFlowContractAppRewriteTacletBuilder
extends RewriteTacletBuilder<InfFlowContractAppTaclet>
    A normal RewriteTacletBuilder except that an InfFlowContractAppTaclet is returned instead of a normal RewriteTaclet. InfFlowContractAppTaclet's are normal RewriteTaclet's except that the formula which is added by the taclets are also added to the list of formulas contained in the INF_FLOW_CONTRACT_APPL_PROPERTY. The INF_FLOW_CONTRACT_APPL_PROPERTY is used by the macros UseInformationFlowContractMacro and PrepareInfFlowContractPreBranchesMacro to decide how to prepare the formulas resulting from information flow contract applications.

    • Constructor Detail

      • AbstractInfFlowContractAppTacletBuilder.InfFlowContractAppRewriteTacletBuilder

        AbstractInfFlowContractAppTacletBuilder.InfFlowContractAppRewriteTacletBuilder()

    • Method Detail

      • getRewriteTaclet

        public InfFlowContractAppTaclet getRewriteTaclet()
        Description copied from class: RewriteTacletBuilder
        builds and returns the RewriteTaclet that is specified by former set... / add... methods. If no name is specified then an Taclet with an empty string name is build. No specifications for variable conditions, goals or heuristics imply that the corresponding parts of the Taclet are empty. No specification for the if-sequent is represented as a sequent with two empty semisequents. No specification for the interactive or recursive flags imply that the flags are not set. No specified find part causes an TacletBuilderException. Throws an TacletBuilderException if a bound SchemaVariable occurs more than once in if and find or an InvalidPrefixException if the building of the Taclet Prefix fails.
        Overrides:
        getRewriteTaclet in class RewriteTacletBuilder<InfFlowContractAppTaclet>
